ops.body: Complete across v0.22.0-v0.25.0, all releases green with matching plugin.json. Source is tilth-free: grep -ri tilth over *.go, cmd/, plugin/, manifests returns nothing. Prose/data residue, deliberately kept or deferred: CHANGELOG (history, per the criterion), bench/analysis/stageE-audit.md (historical measurement record, same class as CHANGELOG), and three internal/astgrep testdata JSONL transcripts recorded over the old tilth.go — re-record deferred to backlog task 7cda024 to avoid post-release golden churn. AGENTS.md entry-6 fragment fix pending in cc-skills (rendered artifact).
